text:
D0200D1_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0200D1_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0200D1 Resident Mood Interview - Little Energy Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the frequency that the resident is having trouble falling or staying asleep, or is sleeping too much. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No (enter 0 in column 2)
1=Yes (enter 0-3 in column 2)
9=No response (leave column 2 blank)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
125 D0200D2_LTL_ENRGY_FREQ_CD D0200D2_LTL_ENRGY_FREQ_CD D0200D2 Resident Mood
